description: subprocess.run with shell=True on a hardcoded command string, no user input
diff:
--- a/scripts/cleanup.py
+++ b/scripts/cleanup.py
@@ -1,4 +1,7 @@
 import subprocess
+import logging
 
 def cleanup_temp():
-    pass
+    logging.info("Cleaning temp files")
+    subprocess.run("rm -rf /tmp/app-cache/*", shell=True, check=True)
+    logging.info("Temp cleanup complete")

mock_response.result: {"review_status":"completed","pass":true,"issues":[],"summary":"shell=True used with hardcoded command string, no user-controlled input flows into the command"}
